name: Guy Goldman
bio: I’m a seasoned medical-device CEO with deep experience in scaling hardware-plus-software companies, raising capital, and driving products from concept to regulatory clearance and commercial launch. I specialize in turning complex technologies into real businesses, building strong partnerships, and leading teams through rapid growth.

name: Nufar Kiryati
interestedIn: Be a guest speaker, Host an event in our offices, Want to pitch my startup
profileCategories: I am an entrepreneur, Looking for my next opportunity, I am a startup seeking for funding
bio:
I work with startups and growing companies as a fractional CMO.
I help them stop doing random marketing and start building something that actually works end-to-end.

I usually come in when there’s product, budget, and effort—but no real engine.
So I connect the dots: messaging, GTM, content, digital, events, community, and data—into one clear system.

My background is very hands-on. I don’t just advise, I build and execute.
From big global events and pop-ups, to LinkedIn content, funnels, dashboards, and even AI tools I’ve built myself to manage marketing and event ROI better.

Recently, I also founded Midblooma—a community and platform focused on women in midlife.
It’s where everything I believe about marketing comes together: community first, real conversations, experience over noise, and building something people actually want to be part of.

I’m big on experience and connection.
For me, good marketing isn’t just about ROI—it’s about ROE.
When people feel part of something, results follow.

name: Ronen Chen
profileCategories: I am an investor, I am an entrepreneur
bio:
Serial Entrepreneur | Fintech Innovator | AI & Web Product Specialist

With over 25 years of leadership in high-tech, I specialize in launching and scaling innovative fintech solutions, AI-driven platforms, and cutting-edge web products. As the founder and CTO of multiple startups, I’ve successfully navigated the challenges of building technologies from the ground up, raising capital, and managing global teams.

My academic foundation includes advanced studies in software genetics and applied mathematics, complemented by hands-on expertise in over 20 programming languages. My work spans fintech, blockchain, deep learning, and behavioral science-driven algorithms, with a focus on delivering impactful solutions that optimize processes and drive business growth.

As a seasoned lecturer and mentor, I am passionate about sharing knowledge and empowering the next generation of tech innovators.

name: Yair Felig
bio: My name is Yair Felig and I'm building conversational AI for kids. As the Customer Success Lead at UG Labs, I come from a background in Psychology and Human-Computer Interactions. I have a unique perspective on the future of AI in games and education, specifically regarding the balance of dangers and opportunities in this space. At UG Labs, we’re building the only voice-to-voice agentic framework designed specifically for children (COPPA/GDPR-K compliant). I've been playtested our tech with thousands of kids, I can discuss the critical risks and massive potential in this field, and I'd love to do a 3-minute pitch on how we’re scaling child-safe AI innovation.

name: Inbal Shenfeld
profileCategories: I am an investor, I am an entrepreneur
bio:
After successfully leading her startup to acquisition by Papaya Global, Inbal Shenfeld brings her expertise and passion for innovation to Helios as Chief of Staff. Her extensive experience as a startup angel investor, with over 50 startups and 4 VC investments, several exits, and a couple of unicorns, speaks volumes about her keen eye for talent and her ability to nurture and foster growth.

Prior to her entrepreneurial ventures, Inbal held key HR and operations positions at Intel, Comverse, and Veolia Environment, overseeing operations across Israel, Europe, and Asia. At Intel, she played a crucial role in strategic innovations, actively participating in thought leadership teams. Her ability to lead high-volume projects and her expertise in organizational structures, high-performance team building, change management, and mergers and acquisitions have been instrumental in her success.

Inbal is now fully immersed in the tech ecosystem of Israel, San Francisco, and London, leveraging her experience and network to support the growth of startups and actively helping build a thriving female-led tech community. Her commitment to empowering women in tech and her dedication to fostering innovation make her an invaluable asset to the industry.

When not immersed in the world of tech, Inbal loves to travel with her husband and kids, exploring new cultures and creating unforgettable memories together. She believes that travel is an enriching experience that broadens horizons and fosters a deeper appreciation for the world's diversity.
